resources.string: This is a test message.\nIn handwriting state, the screen will be locked. If the page view changed, you need to pause the handwriting first.
Low-latency stylus drawing on a SurfaceView using the TouchHelper API. Features brush/pencil switching and region exclusion.
High-performance stylus input on a SurfaceView with hardware-accelerated rendering for minimal lag.
Overlay a scribble layer on a WebView. Includes JS-to-Android callbacks and touch region management for web content.
Interactive eraser that clears drawing paths as the pen moves. Demonstrates manual bitmap manipulation for real-time stroke removal.
Manage multiple independent scribble regions on a single layout. Supports switching between single and multi-region modes.
Triggers a screen refresh when the pen is lifted. Includes adjustable delay settings to balance performance and ghosting.
Raw screen handwriting control using the low-level EpdController. Useful for custom pen state and rendering pipelines.
Enables drawing with fingers instead of just the stylus. Demonstrates toggling finger touch support for the scribble layer.
A collection of scribble/handwriting demos built on the TouchHelper and EpdController APIs. Covers SurfaceView, WebView, erasing, multi-region and refresh strategies.
Full-featured pen drawing demo with a floating toolbar. Switch pen types, colors, textures, line width and eraser modes on an EPD-optimized canvas.
